dialogue.speaker: wren
dialogue.line: It's quiet now. Not gone -- quiet. The wreck's lamp is ours to tend.

dialogue.speaker: tam
dialogue.line: We did it, Wren. First flight, first fight. Sable's going to pretend she isn't proud.

dialogue.speaker: wren
dialogue.line: The lamp is lit. We're aloft. All's well. ...For now.

_note: R3b-2 slice closing cutscene. Reached only after a battle WIN. Sets SLICE_BOSS_CLEARED and ends the vertical slice. Terminal (next[]): the Dialogue scene routes back to the Title on completion.
